channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.description: Palestinians across Gaza and the Occupied West Bank celebrated Spain’s World Cup victory.

item.title: Inside Tinubu’s $3.05bn war chest against poverty
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Despite its abundant natural resources and talented people, Nigeria has for decades struggled with widespread poverty, poor healthcare, weak education and a widening gap between the rich and the poor. The post Inside Tinubu’s $3.05bn war chest against poverty appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: US service member killed during detonation of Iranian drone in Iraq
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: A US soldier has been killed in northern Iraq during a controlled detonation of an Iranian downed drone.

item.title: OPEC: Inflation risks persist despite Nigeria’s rising oil output
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Despite improved crude oil production, stronger government revenues and ongoing economic reforms, the Organisation of the Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC) has warned that Nigeria’s economic recovery could face renewed headwinds from persistently high interest rates and inflation. The post OPEC:

item.title: Forum backs Tinubu’s power sector reforms
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Forum of Power and Energy Commissioners in Nigeria (FPECN) has endorsed President Bola Tinubu’s electricity sector reforms, describing the decentralisation of the power market as a far-reaching step that can transform the Nigeria Electricity Supply Industry (NESI). The post Forum backs Tinubu’s

item.title: Tungsten Miner’s Stock Jumps as Billionaire Forrest Buys Stake
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: EQ Resources Ltd. shares surged after mining billionaire Andrew Forrest agreed to acquire a 16.8% stake in the Sydney-listed tungsten producer from Oaktree Capital Management LP.

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The chairman of Nigerian Exchange Group, Dr Umaru Kwairanga, has called for stronger collaboration between the capital market and insurance industry to mobilise long-term capital, deepen financial inclusion and accelerate sustainable economic growth. The post NGX chair seeks capital market, insuranc

item.title: US, Congo Ebola Travel Restrictions May Hamper Humanitarian Aid Response
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: New US and Congolese travel restrictions aimed at keeping Ebola from spreading across borders are drawing warnings from aid organizations and medical experts who say the measures could undermine efforts to control the world’s fastest-growing outbreak of the virus.

item.description: We look at what's behind Spain's dominance after they become the first nation to be men's and women's World Cup champions at the same time.

item.title: Oil prices surge, stock futures inch higher as fighting between U.S. and Iran intensifies
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Oil prices rose while U.S stock-index futures edged higher on Sunday, amid an escalation of fighting in the Middle East and as investors await key tech earnings this week.

item.title: Norway opens new memorial for victims of 2011 massacre
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The artwork in the capital Oslo was unveiled on Sunday ahead of the 15th anniversary of the attack.

item.title: US VP JD Vance, wife welcome fourth child
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: United States Vice President JD Vance and his wife, Second Lady Usha Vance, have welcomed their fourth child, a baby boy named Alec Neel Vance. The vice president announced the birth on Sunday, revealing that the newborn joins the couple’s three other children, Ewan, Vivek and Mirabel. “Usha and the

item.title: NUPRC wants PPL holders to fast-track asset devt, prioritise host community relations

item.title: Madrid fans react to Spain's World Cup win
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description:
Fans in #Madrid celebrated #Spain's second #WorldCup title win.
Luis de la #Fuente's #Roja beat #Argentina 1-0 in Sunday's final, with Ferran Torres' clinical finish in the extra period.

item.title: Venezuela’s Official Death Toll From Twin Quakes Rises to 5,208
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Venezuela’s official death toll from the twin earthquakes that struck the country on June 24 rose to 5,208, according to the latest figures released on Sunday by National Assembly President Jorge Rodríguez.

item.title: LASEMA blames meter power surge for Lagos building fire
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A power surge from a prepaid meter caused a Lagos building fire in Ketu-Ikosi, LASEMA reports. Two firefighters collapsed during the rescue operation.
Read More: https://punchng.com/lasema-blames-meter-power-surge-for-lagos-building-fire/

item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: As Spain were crowned champions after extra-time thriller against Argentina, fans in New York celebrated the second World Cup title for La Roja.

item.title: Trump, Bieber and Shakira - a World Cup final like never before
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: The 2026 World Cup final may not linger long in the memory for what happened on the pitch but it will for all that surrounded it, with an appearance by President Trump, the longest half-time in football and songs by a host of stars.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Spain crowned champions, fans in jubilation
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Relief and joy for Spanish fans all over the world after Spain's victory over Argentina (1-0).

item.title: Gunmen abduct pastor’s wife, three children in Borno
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Ndahi Marama, Maiduguri Suspected Boko Haram/ISWAP terrorists have abducted the wife of a pastor and his three children in Damasak, headquarters of Mobbar Local Government Area of Borno State. The victims, whose identities have not been disclosed, were reportedly travelling to Damasak on Saturday

item.title: FX turnover surges 46% to $2.39bn on stronger spot trading
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Foreign exchange market activity surged last week as total turnover in the spot and derivatives markets rose 46.27 percent week-on-week to $2.39 billion, driven by a sharp increase in spot transactions. The post FX turnover surges 46% to $2.39bn on stronger spot trading appeared first on Tribune Onl

item.description: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni leaves his post-match news conference after Sunday's World Cup final defeat by Spain in tears.

item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: It might seem like a trite cliche, but you won't find many neutrals disagreeing with that verdict on the World Cup final.

item.title: Trump says World Cup made US a 'soccer country' as he presents trophy to Spain
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: President Donald Trump presented Spain with the World Cup 2026 trophy after its victory over Argentina on Sunday, declaring the tournament showed the United States had become "a soccer country." The final capped more than a year of logistical planning by US, Canadian and Mexican hosts amid controver

item.title: Growing global cancer cases
item.dc:creator: The Sun Editorial
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has, in a new report, highlighted the rising cases of cancer across the world, revealing that about 20.6 million new cases and close to 10 million deaths are recorded worldwide annually. The report also says that cancer is the second leading cause of death. It is

item.title: TCN, NISO deepen synergy to drive power sector
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The managements of the Transmission Company of Nigeria (TCN) and the Nigerian Independent System Operator (NISO), have resolved to deepen collaboration between the two agencies. The post TCN, NISO deepen synergy to drive power sector appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: IDR/USD: Rupiah May Recover on Rate Hike, Stronger Fiscals, Analysts Say
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The Indonesian rupiah is poised for a period of stability, with analysts expecting the central bank to continue supporting Asia’s worst-performing currency and foreign funds to step up purchases of the nation’s high-yielding bonds.

item.description: The death brings the number of US soldiers killed since the start of the US-Israel war on Iran to 17.

item.title: The threat never sleeps: Protecting trust in Africa’s digital economy
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Nkiruka Aimienoho A subtle anomaly. An unpopular call to isolate critical systems. Resistance from every direction. That decision, made years ago with a key stakeholder during a live cybersecurity incident I was managing as a consultant, looked excessive at the time. It turned out to be the diff

item.title: World Cup final player ratings: Messi peters out as super-subs inspire Spain

item.description: Spain beat Argentina 1-0 in one of the most one-sided World Cup finals in history. From Ferran Torres' heroics to Lionel Messi's last dance, here are the player ratings as Luis de la Fuente's side claimed their second star...

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Aston Villa have opened talks with Chelsea over a potential double swoop for Nicolas Jackson and Alejandro Garnacho, as they prepare to lose Morgan Rogers to Stamford Bridge in a British-record transfer, per TEAMtalk. The discussions, held alongside Rogers’ impending move, signal Villa’s aggressive

item.title: Neymar Acquires £17M Superyacht After World Cup Heartbreak
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Neymar Jr. has purchased a £17 million superyacht, completing the deal after Brazil’s shocking round-of-16 exit from the 2026 World Cup at the hands of Norway. The Santos forward’s new vessel, christened “Enejota” — a phonetic play on the Portuguese pronunciation of his initi

item.title: Victor Eburajolo: Mega employer who fought Nigeria’s deliberate de-industrialization, by Owei Lakemfa
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Forty years ago, on July 24, 1986, Victor Ogebyiwa Eburajolo was forty. He was a sought-after expert in the Nigerian industrial complex. A lawyer, business strategist, planning tactician, industrial and labour relations expert. He was then the Executive Secretary of Nigeria Textile Employers. The te

item.title: Jennifer Hudson, Post Malone, Robbie Williams to Headline FIFA World Cup 2026 Closing Ceremony

item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup concluded in grand style on Sunday as a host of global music and entertainment stars headlined a colourful closing ceremony at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey, ahead of the tournament’s final. Academy Award, Emmy, Grammy and Tony winner Jennifer Hudson of

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: History was made at the FIFA World Cup final in New Jersey as football’s biggest spectacle featured its first-ever official halftime show, bringing together an eclectic mix of global music stars and beloved pop culture icons. The groundbreaking performance featured Colombian superstar Shakira,

item.title: US Vice President JD Vance and his wife announce birth of fourth child
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: JD and Usha Vance welcome a baby boy, the first child born to a sitting vice president in more than 150 years.

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Transcorp Power Plc has declared an interim dividend of N1.50 per ordinary share for the half-year ended June 30, 2026, even as revenue and profit before tax declined amid operational disruptions caused by recurring transmission infrastructure vandalism. item.description: That shift did not happen by accident. The post How NUPRC is rebuilding confidence in Nig

item.title: Rodri wins Golden Ball as Spain dominate World Cup awards
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The award adds to an already glittering career for the 30-year-old, who has won the Ballon d'Or, the UEFA Champions League, four Premier League titles, the European Championship and now the FIFA World Cup, further cementing his place among the finest midfielders of his generation.

item.title: Gold Steadies as Traders Assess Rates Path After US-Iran Clashes
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Gold steadied after the US and Iran ramped up attacks over the weekend, as traders assess the likelihood of the Federal Reserve raising interest rates to contain inflation.

item.title: Senate’s belated rise against “repentant” terrorists
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Senate has finally given voice to a national outrage that has simmered for too long: Nigeria’s policy of rehabilitating and reintegrating so-called repentant Boko Haram fighters without doing them justice. It has outlived whatever limited utility its creators may once have claimed. A programme t

item.title: We Have Grown Together – Spain World Cup Winning Coach, de la Fuente
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: An emotional Spain coach Luis de la Fuente spoke of his pride in his players after they won the second World Cup in the country’s history. “I feel especially proud of this generation of footballers who have grown with this idea… giving us an example of a group, of a family,”

item.title: Forest security, mineral resources and food security
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: When a nation loses control of its forests, mineral-rich communities, and agricultural zones, it risks allowing insecurity, illegal exploitation, and economic instability to weaken the foundation of the state. item.title: Spain win World Cup by beating Argentina 1-0
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: La Roja have been crowned World Champions for the second time after a tense battle with Argentina in New Jersey.

item.title: Spain Deserved To World Cup, Says Argentina’s Coach Scaloni
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni admitted Spain were the better team following his team’s 1-0 extra-time defeat in the 2026 World Cup final on Sunday. Substitute Ferran Torres scored in the second period of extra-time as Spain finally broke down 10-man Argentina to win 1-0 at the MetLife Stadium

item.title: Malami’s billions for WAEC fees, by Suleiman A. Suleiman
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The government must resolve the deeply moral question inherent in WAEC and NECO fees even as they are. The post Malami’s billions for WAEC fees, by Suleiman A. Suleiman appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Fast-moving wildfire in southern France forces evacuations, burns homes in Var region
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: A fast-moving wildfire in southern France forced dozens of residents to evacuate on Sunday as more than 600 firefighters and water-bombing aircraft battled the blaze. Fanned by strong winds and dry vegetation, the fire near Draguignan burned 10 homes, damaged nine others and slightly injured one fir

item.title: Andrew, Tristan Tate Arrested In US On New Charges Of Rape, Trafficking
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate have been arrested in the United States after British authorities issued 38 new charges against the brothers, including rape, actual bodily harm and human trafficking. Britain is seeking to extradite the brothers to face prosecution for both the new c

item.title: Mbappe Wins World Cup Golden Boot
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Kylian Mbappe won the 2026 World Cup Golden Boot on Sunday after Lionel Messi failed to add to his tally in the final in New Jersey. The France captain scored 10 goals to top the charts ahead of Argentina great Messi, who finished with eight. England midfielder Jude Bellingham and Norway striker Erl

item.title: Dominant Spain beat Argentina to win World Cup after extra time
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Ferran Torres scores the only goal of the game as Spain dominate Argentina 1-0, to win their second FIFA World Cup at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

item.title: Ballon d’Or 2026 ranking: Yamal emerges favourite after Spain’s World Cup triumph
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Spain’s World Cup triumph has propelled Lamine Yamal to top of the Ballon d’Or 2026 rankings. The post Ballon d’Or 2026 ranking: Yamal emerges favourite after Spain’s World Cup triumph appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: A bird’s-eye view as Donald Trump arrives for the World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Donald Trump arrived at the 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina aboard Marine One.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Rodri wins player of the tournament as Spain sweep individual awards
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Spain captain Rodri has been named the best player of the 206 FIFA World Cup. He was crowned the best player after leading Spain to World Cup triumph on Sunday at the New York/New Jersey stadium. Rodri wins the award ahead of Lionel Messi who scored eight goals and provided four asissts in the tourn
